StoryTeaser.heading: The Long Island Pool Table Superstore
StoryTeaser.text: Regal Billiards started as a pool table manufacturer right here on Long Island. Today, Mike Walsh and his team bring that same builder's knowledge to every table they sell, deliver, and service. When you buy from Regal, you're not just getting a table — you're getting a team that knows it inside and out.
StoryTeaser.subheading: Every Day Low Prices — We Are Here to Help

CTA.heading: Not sure where to start?
CTA.text: Visit the showroom or give Mike a call. No pressure, just good advice from people who've been doing this for over 40 years.

BuyingGuide.title: What to know before you buy
BuyingGuide.metaTitle: Buying a Pool Table | Regal Billiards — Long Island's Game Room Destination
BuyingGuide.metaDescription: Everything you need to know before buying a pool table. Room size, construction quality, and why buying local matters.
BuyingGuide.intro: A pool table is a big purchase — and it should be. It's the centerpiece of your game room, and if you buy the right one, it'll last a lifetime. Here's what we think matters most.
BuyingGuide.challengeHeading: Choosing a pool table isn't simple
BuyingGuide.challengeText: There are hundreds of tables on the market at every price point. The challenge isn't finding one — it's knowing which one will hold up, play well, and fit your room. That's where we come in.
BuyingGuide.manufacturerText: Regal Billiards began as a pool table manufacturer right here on Long Island. That experience taught us exactly what separates a well-built table from one that looks good in a catalog but won't last. We use that knowledge to choose every table we carry.
BuyingGuide.serviceHeading: We don't just sell — we service
BuyingGuide.serviceText: Every table we sell, we deliver, assemble, and level ourselves. And if anything needs attention down the road, our factory-trained technicians handle it. That's why we only sell locally — so we can stand behind every table.
BuyingGuide.dimensionsCard: Table dimensions and room size requirements
BuyingGuide.dimensionsDesc: Make sure your room is ready before you buy.
BuyingGuide.constructionDesc: What to look for in slate, frame, cushions, and cloth.
BuyingGuide.warrantyDesc: Our manufacturers stand behind their work — and so do we.
BuyingGuide.bottomCta: Not sure where to start? Come walk the showroom.

Warranty.metaDescription: Our manufacturers back their tables with a lifetime warranty. Learn what's covered and why it matters.

ServiceCenter.title: Your table deserves expert care
ServiceCenter.metaTitle: Pool Table Service Center | Regal Billiards — Long Island
ServiceCenter.metaDescription: Pool table moves, re-felting, cushion replacement, repairs, and leveling. Factory-trained technicians serving Nassau County, Suffolk County, Brooklyn, and Queens.
ServiceCenter.intro: Whether you bought your table from us or somewhere else, our factory-trained technicians are here to help.
ServiceCenter.serviceEveryoneText: You don't need to have bought your table from us. If your table needs work — whether it's a move, a re-felt, a cushion swap, or just a re-level — we're happy to help. We service all brands, all sizes, all ages.
ServiceCenter.step1Desc: Tell us what you need and we'll give you an honest estimate.
ServiceCenter.step2Desc: We'll find a time that works for you.
ServiceCenter.areaText: Serving Nassau County, Suffolk County, Brooklyn, and Queens.
ServiceCenter.formMessage: Tell us more about what you need
ServiceCenter.formSuccess: Thank you! We'll get back to you within one business day.
ServiceCenter.formError: Something went wrong. Please call us at (516) 938-6832.
ServiceCenter.areaNote: Not sure if you're in our range? Give us a call — we'll figure it out.
ServiceCenter.quoteSubtext: Prefer to talk? Call Mike directly at (516) 938-6832. We respond to all form submissions within one business day.

About.title: 40 years. One family. Every table done right.
About.metaTitle: About Regal Billiards — Long Island's Game Room Destination
About.metaDescription: Family-owned and veteran-operated for over 40 years. Learn the story of Regal Billiards and why Long Island trusts us with their game rooms.
About.heroSubtext: What started as a small manufacturing shop on Long Island became the region's most trusted name in pool tables and game rooms. Four decades later, we're still here — still family-run, still hands-on with every table.
About.originHeading: We built tables before we sold them
About.originText: Regal Billiards didn't start as a showroom. We started as builders — manufacturing pool tables by hand right here on Long Island. Every joint, every slate seam, every pocket. That's not a marketing line. It's how Mike Walsh learned the business from the ground up. And it's why, forty years later, our team can look at any table and tell you exactly what it needs.
About.originQuote: When you buy from Regal, you're getting a team that built tables before they sold them. We know every one inside and out.
About.mikeText: Mike has been at Regal since the beginning — over four decades of building, selling, delivering, and servicing pool tables. He's not a salesman. He's a craftsman who happens to run a showroom. When you walk in, there's no pitch. Just honest conversation about what's going to work for your space, your budget, and the way you actually play.
About.veteranText: Regal Billiards is a proud veteran-owned business. The same discipline and integrity that define service to country define how we run our shop. We show up on time, we do the job right, and we stand behind our work. That's not a slogan — it's forty years of proof.
About.philosophyText: We only sell to customers we can personally serve. Long Island and the boroughs — that's our territory. We handle every delivery, every installation, every service call ourselves. No subcontractors. No third-party shippers. No strangers in your home. Just our team — the same people who helped you choose the table in the first place.
About.showroomText: Pool tables set up and ready to play. Game room furniture you can sit in. Darts you can throw. Our Hicksville showroom isn't a warehouse — it's a game room. No appointment needed during regular hours.

Collection.metaTitle: Our Collection | Regal Billiards — Pool Tables, Game Room Furniture & More
Collection.metaDescription: Browse pool tables, game room furniture, darts, accessories, and more. Visit our Hicksville, NY showroom to see everything in person.
Collection.title: Our Collection
Collection.description: Everything for your game room — from premium pool tables to accessories and game room furniture. Browse by category or visit us in Hicksville to see it all in person.

PoolTablesPage.manufacturerIntro: We hand-pick every table we carry. After 40 years in the business — including years as manufacturers ourselves — we know what makes a table worth owning. That's why we only work with manufacturers who combine world-class construction with eye-catching design.
PoolTablesPage.presidentialDesc: Solid hardwoods, center-beam slate support, and hand-finished details that make every table a showpiece. Presidential tables are built to last generations — and designed to be the centerpiece of any room.
PoolTablesPage.clBaileyDesc: Known for their attention to detail and quality craftsmanship, C.L. Bailey tables offer exceptional value without cutting corners. Solid construction, beautiful finishes, and smooth playability.
PoolTablesPage.imperialDesc: From classic designs to modern aesthetics, Imperial offers a wide range of tables built with quality materials and professional-grade components. Great options at every price point.

UsedPoolTables.introText: At Regal Billiards we typically maintain a diverse inventory of quality pre-owned pool tables. Every used table we sell has been personally inspected by our team and meets our standards for playability and condition.
UsedPoolTables.pitfallsHeading: What to watch for when buying used
UsedPoolTables.pitfallsText: When looking to buy a used pool table, remember that even with a 'good' table, there are hidden costs. You'll need to pay for moving — disassembly, transport, and reassembly isn't cheap. The felt may need replacing. The cushions might be dead. And you'll likely need new accessories. Those costs add up fast.
UsedPoolTables.differenceText: At Regal Billiards we've taken care of these pitfalls. Every table we sell has been verified for quality — the slate is true, the cushions are functional, and the table has already been properly disassembled and transported by professionals.
UsedPoolTables.includesList: Our price includes delivery, professional installation, the option for fresh cloth, and accessories. You know exactly what you're getting at exactly what price. No surprises.
UsedPoolTables.brandsText: Brunswick, Olhausen, Connelly, Gandy, AMF, and more. Inventory changes frequently — call us or stop by to see what's available.

GameRoomFurniture.introText: Complete your game room with furniture designed to complement your pool table. From spectator chairs to full bar setups, we carry pieces built to match the quality and style of your table.
GameRoomFurniture.presidentialText: Solid wood constructed furniture with incredible hand-crafted details and flourishes. Many of the designs and wood stains are specifically crafted to match Presidential pool tables — so your entire game room has a cohesive, custom look.
GameRoomFurniture.levelBestText: Produced by C.L. Bailey, Level Best furniture is known for high quality and durability. Their multi-function game tables are a showroom favorite — perfect for homes where space is at a premium.
GameRoomFurniture.ramText: Modern bar and game room furniture with clean lines and solid construction. RAM offers everything from full-size bars to barstools, pub tables, and game tables — all designed to create the ultimate entertainment space.

GameTables.introText: From simple but well-constructed pieces that deliver a great playing experience to furniture-quality tables that double as room centerpieces — we carry game tables for every space and budget.

DartsPage.introText: Professional bristle dartboards, electronic boards, cabinet sets, and steel-tip and soft-tip dart sets for every skill level. Whether you're setting up a casual corner or a serious throw line, we have what you need.

AccessoriesPage.introText: Everything you need for your table — and some things you didn't know you needed. From premium Aramith ball sets to Simonis cloth, proper lighting, and complete accessory packages. We carry the brands the pros use.

CueSticksPage.introText: With over 90 cue sticks on display and access to hundreds more, we carry everything from basic one-piece house cues to high-quality two-piece cues for serious players. Stop in to try before you buy.
CueSticksPage.brandsText: Authorized dealer for Players, Lucasi, Predator, Cuetec, Viper, Viking, and more.
CueSticksPage.beginnerText: New to the game? A solid one-piece house cue or an affordable two-piece cue from Players or Viper is a great starting point. Spend $30-$80 and focus on learning your stroke.
CueSticksPage.intermediateText: Ready to invest in your game? Cuetec, Dufferin, and Valhalla cues offer excellent performance in the $60-$200 range. You'll feel the difference in balance and hit quality.
CueSticksPage.advancedText: For competitive players, Lucasi, Viking, and Predator cues deliver professional-grade performance. Custom wraps, low-deflection shafts, and premium tips. $200 and up.

ProductDetail.priceNote: Prices vary by size and options. Visit the showroom or call for a quote.
